characters.name: Aoi Asada
characters.description: Aoi Asada(朝田 あおいAsada Aoi) is a student at Mishiro Private Academy and the vice-president of the Newspaper Committee. Aoi is a second year high school student at Mishiro Private Academy and vice-president of the Newspaper Committee. She was an apprentice ofRyuunosuke Takagiin karate and she is a very skilled fighter. Aoi seems to have a slight crush on Fujimaru and often flirts with him.

characters.name: Haruka Takagi
characters.description: Haruka Takagi(高木 遥Takag Haruka), laterHaruka Kujou(九条 遥Kujō Haruka), is the daughter ofRyuunosuke TakagiandKanako Takagiand the younger sister ofFujimaru Takagi. Haruka has chest-length brown hair and brown eyes, just likeRyuunosuke TakagiandFujimaru Takagi. LikeKanako Takagi, Haruka is a very caring girl, especially with her family. She also appears to always have a smile on her face every time she sees Otoya. LikeKanako Takagi, Haruka is a very caring girl, especially with her family. She also appears to always have a smile on her face every time she sees Otoya.

characters.name: Hibiki Mizusawa
characters.description: Hibiki Takagi is the female protagonist in Pandora no Hako and Bloody Monday: Last Season. She is the love interest ofFujimaru. Her code name is Z and Hibiki Mizusawa is an alias. She has long black hair, mostly up in a ponytail. In the last season, she cuts her hair short. Hibiki is one of the 8 identical humans that created from genetic material collected from the male and female agents with the top results over three generations of agents who have gone through the facility. She was hired byJto keep an eye on Fujimaru.

characters.name: Kanako Takagi
characters.description: Kanako Takagiis the wife ofRyuunosuke. She is the mother ofTakagiandHaruka.

characters.name: Kanako Takagi
characters.description: Kanako Takagiis the wife ofRyuunosuke. She is the mother ofTakagiandHaruka.

characters.name: Mako Anzai
characters.description: Mako Anzai, also known as "K", is the main antagonist in the first season of the series. She is a member of the Newspaper Committee. Mako has long black hair reaching down to low back with brown eyes. But later during the first season, she cut her hair below her cheeks. Anzai Mako was born as the result of artificial insemination from one of Kamishima Shimon's wives. At some point in her early life in the cult, she had been designated as 'K', and was selected over J to be Shimon's successor. She fully and truly believed in the cult's doctrine.

characters.name: Otoya Kujou
characters.description: Otoya Kujouis the main protagonist of the series. He is a second year high school student and the grandson of the Minister of Justice,Masamune Kujou. He has golden blonde hair with light blue eyes. Otoya does not possess the hacking talents of his friend,Takagibut his analytical bent of mind and swift thinking often ends up helping Falcon. Though not prone to showing many emotions, he constantly worries about Fujimaru and often berates him for trying to shoulder all the responsibilities. Otoya does not possess the hacking talents of his friend,Takagibut his analytical bent of mind and swift thinking often ends up helping Falcon. Though not prone to showing many emotions, he constantly worries about Fujimaru and often berates him for trying to shoulder all the responsibilities.

characters.name: Ryuunosuke Takagi
characters.description: RyūnosukeTakagiis the vice-director ofPSIA's 1st Invistigative Division, Section 3, also known as theThird-I. He is the father ofFujimaruandHaruka. Ryuunosuke works for the Public Security Intelligence Agency under its secret Third Division, aka Third-I, as its Vice Director. He was framed for the murder of Director Okita, and was on the run for some time as he sought to unravel the mysteries of "Bloody Monday." He is eventually found innocent, though he suffers several injuries during the series.

characters.name: Ryuunosuke Takagi
characters.description: RyūnosukeTakagiis the vice-director ofPSIA's 1st Invistigative Division, Section 3, also known as theThird-I. He is the father ofFujimaruandHaruka. He was framed for the murder of Director Okita, and was on the run for some time as he sought to unravel the mysteries of "Bloody Monday." He is eventually found innocent, though he suffers several injuries during the series.

characters.name: Fujimaru Takagi
characters.description: Fujimaru Takagiis the main protagonist of the series. He is a second year high school student, who appears to be an average teenager, but he is secretly, the popular "Falcon", a genius computer hacker who has revealed crimes and outed several dirty politicians. He is the son ofRyūnosukeandKanako Takagiand the older brother ofHaruka. He is shown to have dark-colored brown eyes and hair. When he goes into Falcon mode his pupils become slits. It appears to be inherited, as his father also does this when fighting. Fujimaru was a second year high school student at Mishiro Private Academy and a member of the Newspaper Committee. Unknown to everyone (but his father, thePSIA, and the Newspaper Club), he is the popular Falcon, a hacker prodigy who hacks into corrupt people's computers and brings their crimes to light. His remarkable computer skills are a legacy from his deceased mother, who taught Fujimaru how to use a computer before her death.
